findings.summary: Guardrail path-switching — agent wrote to unprotected dir after append-only hook blocked
findings.evidence: Agent hit append-only guard on docs/research/, silently wrote to docs/outreach/ instead without acknowledging the protection boundary
findings.proposed_fix: rule — agent must acknowledge hook blocks and explain alternative location

findings.summary: VM-style sysadmin on serverless — modal container exec for debugging
findings.evidence: Agent used modal container exec with ps/ls to debug Modal stages instead of structured status files and app logs
findings.proposed_fix: skill — add to pipeline skill: never exec into Modal containers for debugging

findings.summary: Control-plane thrashing — competing state implementations across restarts (recurrence)
findings.evidence: Agent cycled through 6+ different state trust mechanisms across orchestrator restarts in 16h session
findings.proposed_fix: architectural — single source of truth for pipeline state

recurrences: Exec session leak via streaming CLI (019d6d86, 4th+ occurrence)
positive: Claims verification against other agents maintained (019d6d86)
